title: Candle Transcription Model Spec
description: Candle model specification for audio transcription (Whisper).
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies an OpenAI Whisper model for audio-to-text transcription via the Candle backend. Whisper is an encoder-decoder model that accepts mel spectrograms of audio and produces text transcriptions.

## When to use
Use this type when wiring an audio transcription cap that targets the Candle runtime. The default points to Whisper Base, a compact model suitable for real-time transcription. Larger variants (Small, Medium, Large) offer higher accuracy at greater compute cost.

## Notes
Whisper models require audio preprocessing (resampling to 16 kHz, mel spectrogram extraction) before the model is invoked. This preprocessing is typically handled by the cap implementation, not the model spec itself.
